codeReview.summary: The implementation covers the requested TRUTH-PERP scope end to end: the `truth-perp-flywheel` graph node is registered with the required relationships, the surface is wired into `GraphExplorer`, the content includes HIP-3 / Hyperliquid, `500k HYPE ($11M)`, the `Nasdaq of Truth` synthetic-index framing, the `vBETTER` / `enzyme.finance` ETF premium capture loop, the `30%` buy-and-burn sink, and the three Q1/Q2/Q4 phases, and the rendered surface uses the existing shadcn-backed `BetterCard` pattern with `MaturityBadge` and `EvidenceHook` cues. I did not find feature-specific correctness or coverage defects in the reviewed diff.
